description:
Create a multi-file Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\bolo_alert\ that stores individual pieces of a BOLO alert in memory, formats them, and inserts a complete standardized text block on command. 

In bolo_manager.py, maintain state for six fields (incident, suspect, vehicle, plate, dot, and armed) defaulting to "UNSPECIFIED". Implement actions to update these fields, ensuring user.bolo_set_plate strips whitespace and converts to uppercase, and user.bolo_set_dot and user.bolo_set_armed convert to uppercase. Include a user.bolo_reset() action to clear all fields, a user.bolo_get_text() action to return the formatted alert, and a user.bolo_insert() action that inserts the text and resets the state.

The user.bolo_get_text() action must return a string in this exact format:
*** BOLO ALERT ***
INCIDENT: <incident>
SUSPECT: <suspect>
VEHICLE: <vehicle>
PLATE: <plate>
DOT: <dot>
ARMED: <armed>
******************

In bolo.talon, map the following voice commands to their respective actions: 'bolo set incident <user.text>', 'bolo set suspect <user.text>', 'bolo set vehicle <user.text>', 'bolo set plate <user.text>', 'bolo set direction <user.text>', 'bolo set armed <user.text>', 'bolo clear all', and 'bolo generate'.
